description: Offline gold retrieval dataset for the scientific-memory slice. Each item maps a query to content markers expected in a relevant chunk. Relevance is judged deterministically (no LLM). Assumes the bundled glossary + Phase 3 architecture docs are ingested.

items.query: why is SGP4 not used for asteroids and comets
is a close approach the same as an impact
relevant_markers: close approach is NOT an impact

items.query: what does an epistemic status label mean
what is a two line element set TLE
how is provenance recorded for sample data
